axioms.name: Genius AND Art
axioms.statement: Poetry requires both natural gift (genius) and disciplined study (art). Neither barren toil nor untrained talent suffices.

axioms.name: Instruct and Delight
axioms.statement: The goal of poetry is to benefit (prodesse) and please (delectare). The optimal work blends the useful with the pleasant.

axioms.name: Unity as Supreme Virtue
axioms.statement: Every part of a work must be essential to one simple whole. No part should be dispensable or incongruous.

axioms.name: Decorum governs All
axioms.statement: Appropriateness to subject, character, genre, and audience is the governing principle of all creative choices.

axioms.name: No Middle Ground
axioms.statement: Poetry admits no mediocrity. If it falls short of the first rank, it is counted among the worst.

levels.name: ONE_SIMPLE_WHOLE
levels.description: The complete work unified by a single central design

levels.name: ACT
levels.description: One of five major structural divisions (for drama)

levels.name: SCENE
levels.description: Action display or narrated event following decorum

core_algorithms.name: Chimera Test
core_algorithms.purpose: Identify and remove incongruous elements that damage structural unity
core_algorithms.pseudocode: FOR each element E in work: IF E.origin_domain != primary_domain: IF connection NOT justified: FLAG_AS_CHIMERIC; RETURN analysis;

core_algorithms.name: Ages of Man Algorithm
core_algorithms.purpose: Assign character traits based on the appropriate biological and social lifecycle stage
core_algorithms.pseudocode: age_bracket = determine_age(character); RETURN LIFECYCLE_PROFILE[age_bracket]; // Profiles: Boy, Youth, Mature Man, Old Man

core_algorithms.name: In Medias Res Protocol
core_algorithms.purpose: Enter the narrative at the most engaging point rather than absolute origin
core_algorithms.pseudocode: 1. IDENTIFY absolute_origin (The Double Egg); 2. IDENTIFY heart_of_things; 3. START at heart_of_things; 4. BLEND fiction with truth for consistency;

core_algorithms.name: Show vs Tell Decision Tree
core_algorithms.purpose: Determine whether an event should be displayed on stage or narrated
core_algorithms.pseudocode: IF event == transformation OR event == atrocity: method = NARRATION; ELIF event.impact == positive: method = SHOW; ELSE: method = CASE_BASIS;

core_algorithms.name: The Nine-Year Rule
core_algorithms.purpose: Ensure extreme polish through long-term gestation and revision
core_algorithms.pseudocode: WHILE time_elapsed < 9_YEARS: APPLY 'labor of the file'; SEEK honest critics; DELETE 'purple patches'; RETURN polished_work;

diagnostic_questions.question: Is every part of the work essential to one simple whole?
Do the style and speech match the character's age, rank, and situation (Decorum)?
Does the work enter 'in medias res' (into the heart of things)?
Are 'purple patches' (isolated brilliant but non-functional passages) removed?
Does the work aim to both instruct and delight?
Has the 'labor of the file' been applied to achieve tenfold perfection?

maps_to: McKee's Value Turn (implied in Decorum shifts)
Larry David's Comedy Geometry (Social Decorum vs Social Friction)
